name: Instant
description: Instant — Client-side database with optimistic updates, real-time sync, and offline support built on Datalog.

seo.title: Instant — DBaaS / Serverless Databases
seo.meta_description: Instant: Instant — Client-side database with optimistic updates, real-time sync, and offline support built on Datalog.

when_to_use: Client-side database with optimistic updates and real-time sync
Offline-capable collaborative apps backed by Datalog queries
Real-time multi-user state sync without custom WebSocket code
Replacing Firebase Realtime DB with a typed Datalog backend
Building local-first apps with automatic server reconciliation

pros: Datalog queries give powerful relational reads
cons: Unclear scaling limits for huge datasets
Smaller community than Firebase or Supabase
review.verdict: Exciting local-first DB for real-time apps, too new for production workloads with heavy compliance or scale needs.
review.best_for: Small teams building real-time collaborative apps wanting local-first DX
review.not_for: Production apps needing mature ecosystem and proven horizontal scale
